size.note: single cohesive test module; line count dominated by docstrings + discrete assertion blocks, not logic

completeness.note: diff is itself a test file

architecture.note: test-only diff; no domain->infra import, no singleton, no new external call

security.note: no secret-shaped strings; only fixture dna: IDs

quality.note: diff IS the test; ruff+py_compile clean; no CR-10 perf surface (no loops); no JSX
